name: Iph Limited
analysis: IPH's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 18% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$4.1700. Trade idea: entry A$4.2100, stop A$3.6877, target A$5.7768 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
